name: Tarzan
desc: Tarzan (William Dafoe face version): Male, extremely thin and lanky body, very slender with visible ribs and long limbs, no muscle mass. Face of William Dafoe - weathered, angular face with high cheekbones, deep-set eyes, prominent nose, expressive mouth. Long wild unkempt dark hair. Wears only a ragged brown loincloth. Barefoot. Style: semi-realistic comic/cartoon. Tall and wiry physique. Jungle setting.
